description: Product Description Looking for the perfect solution to get rid of plaque without visiting the dentist? Want to get rid of unpleasant mouth odor and let your smile shine? Presenting A Plaque Remover Teeth Cleaning Tool Suitable for Adults, Kids, And Even Pet. High-Quality Stainless Steel The high-quality stainless steel ensures that the tool stays dust-free and durable so that it stays with you for a long time. It also comes with a leather case, making it travel-friendly All in One Solution For Dental Problems The kit comes as a set of four multi-purpose tools to help get rid of all your teeth problems. Plaque? Check. Unpleasant mouth odor? Check. Tartar? Yes, you guessed it right, check. Easy To Use The ergonomic design of the tools allows you to handle them with ease. Would you be trying a dental kit for the first time ?The kit comes with an instruction manual that will make its use super easy. Super Easy To Clean Are you planning to use the same tool for your family members ? No problem at all! It is easy to clean and disinfect. Just insert the tool in hot water, and it is as good as new.
